body: Amara, just following up on our conversation from last week about the [Halfway Capital](vc/halfway-capital) pipeline review — I wanted to make sure my notes from the call were accurate before you head into your LP meeting next month. Specifically, I want to confirm that the two climate infrastructure deals you flagged (the grid-edge storage company and the carbon data platform) are both still tracking toward term sheets by end of Q3. I also wanted to share a quick thought on the AI infrastructure side: I've been spending time with a founder building distributed inference tooling for energy-constrained environments, and given your thesis overlap between climate and AI infra, it felt worth a warm intro conversation if you have bandwidth. Let me know if a 30-minute call early next week works, or I'm happy to just make the email intro if that's easier. Always appreciate your time on these, Amara.
